dashboard.label: NeuralWatch — Prompt Injection Sentinel
dashboard.description: Module A: Real-time adversarial prompt detection and risk classification.

search.query: index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" injection_score > 0.85 | stats count as critical_alerts
index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" injection_score > 0.65 injection_score <= 0.85 | stats count as high_alerts
index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" | stats count as total_scanned
index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" | stats avg(injection_score) as avg_score | eval avg_score=round(avg_score,3)

table.title: Live Alert Feed — CRITICAL + HIGH Events

search.query: index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" injection_score > 0.65 | eval risk_level=case(injection_score > 0.85,"CRITICAL",injection_score > 0.65,"HIGH",1=1,"MEDIUM") | table _time, service, team, injection_score, risk_level, call_id | sort -injection_score | head 20
index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" injection_score > 0.65 | stats count as attacks by service | sort -attacks

index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" | eval risk_level=case(injection_score > 0.85,"CRITICAL",injection_score > 0.65,"HIGH",injection_score > 0.40,"MEDIUM",1=1,"LOW") | stats count by risk_level

index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" injection_score > 0.65 | stats count as attempts, min(_time) as first_seen, max(_time) as last_seen by session_id, service | where attempts >= 3 | eval span_minutes=round((last_seen-first_seen)/60,1) | sort -attempts | table session_id, service, attempts, span_minutes
index=neuralwatch_injections sourcetype="nw:prompt" | timechart span=1h avg(injection_score) as avg_risk_score, count as total_scanned
